query: ok lets see whats going on with the project, I haven't looked at this in a few days

I think the login page is done, can you check if everything passes before I mark it complete?
wrap it up for today, lets log what we did and save progress
this project doesnt have any task tracking set up yet, can you initialize something?

show me what tasks are available to pick up, I just finished my last one

we need to plan out the next sprint, lets create an epic for the payment integration and break it into tasks
can you refactor the getUserById function to use async/await instead of callbacks? its in src/services/user.ts
write unit tests for the calculateDiscount function in pricing.py, cover edge cases with zero quantities

create a new React component called DataTable that supports sorting and pagination, use the design system tokens
can you explain how the middleware chain works in this express app? I'm confused about the order of execution
fix the bug where the dropdown menu closes when you click inside it, I think its a z-index issue in the modal overlay
I need to track my daily calories and macros, can you help me build a spreadsheet template for that?
review this PR for security issues — its adding OAuth2 support and I want to make sure the token handling is solid
generate a shader that creates a holographic dissolve effect with edge glow for UE5
I want to commit what we've done so far and push it to the feature branch
